cookies.title: Cookie Preferences
cookies.message: We use technical cookies to keep the site working and optional analytics cookies to understand how guests move through the experience.
cookies.technical.title: Technical cookies
cookies.technical.description: Required for language, display mode, consent, and core interface preferences.
cookies.analytics.title: Analytics cookies
cookies.analytics.description: Help us understand visits and improve the booking path. These are optional.
hero.sub: Three private bungalows. Infinite savannah. Namibia.
philosophy.quote: We believe that true luxury is the space between you and the horizon.
philosophy.body.primary: Nestled in 4 000 hectares of private concession on Namibia's sun-baked plains, Mt.Otjiku Getaway offers three handcrafted bungalows built from reclaimed hardwood and raw stone.
philosophy.body.secondary: No two are identical. Each opens onto an unbroken panorama of ochre grass, distant kopjes, and after sundown, a sky so dense with stars it seems solid.
bungalows.title: Three Private Sanctuaries
bungalows.dune.title: Dune Suite
bungalows.dune.description: Raised on stilts above a seasonal riverbed. King bed beneath a retractable canvas roof. Sleep under stars.
bungalows.dune.detail: The Dune Suite is closest to the open grassland, made for guests who want first light, long silence, and a direct line of sight to the waterhole. Its gallery follows the approach across green savannah, golden wildlife sightings, and the weather rolling in over the plains.
bungalows.dune.view: Open grassland, waterhole edge, sunset ridges

bungalows.kopje.title: Kopje Loft
bungalows.kopje.description: Built into a granite outcrop. A plunge pool carved from living rock. The plains stretch 60 km to the west.
bungalows.kopje.detail: Kopje Loft sits higher and closer to the stone, with shaded edges, deep afternoon color, and the most cinematic view back toward the reserve. The photos collect the rock line, dry-country wildlife, and vertical details around the outcrop.
bungalows.kopje.view: Granite shade, acacia line, western plain
bungalows.kopje.gallery.0.alt: Kopje Loft twin bedroom with wood chest and dark curtains
bungalows.kopje.gallery.0.open: Open Kopje Loft twin bedroom photo

bungalows.kopje.gallery.2.alt: Tall portrait view of savannah vegetation and warm earth
bungalows.kopje.gallery.2.open: Open Kopje Loft vertical landscape photo
bungalows.horizon.title: Horizon Pavilion
bungalows.horizon.description: Floor-to-ceiling glass. A wrap-around deck. At dusk, oryx and springbok gather at the waterhole below.
bungalows.horizon.detail: Horizon Pavilion is the most panoramic of the three: glass, deck, sky, and a feeling that the reserve keeps unfolding beyond the last visible tree. The gallery leans into distance, dusk, and the changing light across the property.
bungalows.horizon.view: Long horizon, deck line, twilight sky
bungalows.horizon.gallery.0.alt: Horizon Pavilion bedroom with blue bedding and ceiling fan

experience.title: Rituals of the Reserve
experience.dawn.title: Dawn Game Drive
experience.dawn.description: Before first light, your private guide leads you into the reserve. No roads. No other vehicles. Only the snap of dry grass and something vast moving in the half-dark.
experience.dawn.alt: Elephants moving through a Namibian savannah landscape
experience.chef.title: Chef's Table Under Canvas
experience.chef.description: Each evening, your in-residence chef prepares a five-course menu sourced from Namibian farms and the garden. Wine chosen from a cellar of 400 Southern African labels.
experience.chef.alt: Elegant dinner table prepared under canvas
experience.stars.title: Stargazing Concierge
experience.stars.description: Namibia hosts some of the darkest skies on earth. Our resident astronomer sets up a 14-inch Celestron on your deck and stays as long as you want to stay.
experience.stars.alt: A brilliant night sky filled with stars
location.title: Placed Where Silence Has Scale
location.description: Mt.Otjiku Getaway is imagined on the Otjiku plains of Otjozondjupa, close enough to Namibia's northern routes, distant enough to feel entirely claimed by the horizon.
location.otjiwarongo.label: Otjiwarongo
location.airport.label: Hosea Kutako International Airport
location.windhoek.label: Windhoek
location.waterberg.label: Waterberg Plateau area
location.etosha.label: Etosha Anderson Gate
booking.title: Begin Your Journey
booking.body: Mt.Otjiku Getaway accommodates a maximum of six guests at any time. Availability is limited.
booking.note: No booking fees. Cancel up to 72 hours before arrival.
booking.backgroundAlt: Namibian savannah landscape at golden hour
